title: On-call user can't restart the service: no sudo rights
description_md:
The `oncall` user is supposed to be able to run administrative commands via `sudo`, but every attempt fails with `oncall is not in the sudoers file`. Their access was never actually granted. SSH in as `trainee` (you have full passwordless `sudo`), grant `oncall` passwordless sudo the proper way (a drop-in file, validated with visudo semantics), without hand-editing the main sudoers file.

You're done when `oncall` can run a command via `sudo -n`.
